en.description: I am an experienced Android Developer with over 8 years of experience specializing in building high-quality, robust mobile applications. I have deep expertise in **Kotlin**, **Java**, and the modern Android ecosystem, along with hands-on experience in full-stack web development using **Vue.js** and **PHP**.
I am passionate about creating clean, performant, and user-friendly mobile experiences while solving complex software architecture challenges. Let's connect and build something amazing!
